mapper.select: SELECT ch_seq, health::text AS health, routine::text AS routine, development::text AS development, education::text AS education, safety::text AS safety, misc::text AS misc, updated_at AS updated_at, updated_by FROM child_profile WHERE ch_seq = #{childId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO child_profile (ch_seq, updated_by) VALUES (#{childId}, #{updatedBy, typeHandler=com.childcare.global.config.UuidTypeHandler}::uuid) ON CONFLICT (ch_seq) DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO child_profile_summary (ch_seq, summary_text, summary_version) VALUES (#{childId}, #{summaryText}, #{summaryVersion}) ON CONFLICT (ch_seq) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO child_profile ( ch_seq, health, routine, development, education, safety, misc, updated_at, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{childId}, CAST(#{health} AS jsonb), CAST(#{routine} AS jsonb), CAST(#{development} AS jsonb), CAST(#{education} AS jsonb), CAST(#{safety} AS jsonb), CAST(#{misc} AS jsonb), NOW(), #{updatedBy, typeHandler=com.childcare.global.config.UuidTypeHandler}::uuid ) ON CONFLICT (ch_seq) DO UPDATE SET health = EXCLUDED.health, routine = EXCLUDED.routine, development = EXCLUDED.development, education = EXCLUDED.education, safety = EXCLUDED.safety, misc = EXCLUDED.misc, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by

INSERT INTO child_profile_summary (ch_seq, summary_text, summary_version, updated_at) VALUES (#{childId}, #{summaryText}, #{summaryVersion}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (ch_seq) DO UPDATE SET summary_text = EXCLUDED.summary_text, summary_version = EXCLUDED.summary_version, updated_at = NOW()
